title: Medan, North Sumatra — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Medan, North Sumatra: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Medan is a city in North Sumatra with a population of 2,435,000. North Sumatra’s largest city and a multicultural gateway to Lake Toba and the Bukit Barisan highlands.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
